center.name: Maranhão River
center.summary: The Maranhão River is a river of Goiás state in central Brazil.

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The nominate subspecies of lettered aracari is found in north central Brazil south of the Amazon River between the Madeira and Maranhão rivers and from there south to northern Bolivia and the Brazilian state of Mato Grosso and the upper Tocantins River
